## Description

Please include a summary of the change, the motivation behind it, and any relevant issue numbers (e.g., `Closes #123`).

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update (TechDocs, README, etc.)
- [ ] DevOps / CI / NixOS environment configuration change

## Checklist

- [ ] I have verified my code locally using the `devenv` / `nix develop` environment.
- [ ] I have run syntax checks and verified all pages load correctly.
- [ ] I have updated the Backstage TechDocs or `README.md` to match my changes if applicable.
- [ ] My changes generate no new linting or security warnings.
